log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Loxodon — Unarmored Caster's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:14+3=17 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:4+-2=2 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:6+-2=4 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ 2/3 targets affected.
Ogre is incapacitated — skipping turn.
--- Frost Giant's turn ---
Frost Giant attacks Loxodon — Unarmored Caster with Greataxe: [d20:13+9=22 vs AC 17] HIT! 28 damage. Loxodon — Unarmored Caster HP: 39/67
Frost Giant attacks Loxodon — Unarmored Caster with Greataxe: [d20:15+9=24 vs AC 17] HIT! 23 damage. Loxodon — Unarmored Caster HP: 16/67
Ogre is incapacitated — skipping turn.
=== ROUND 2 ===
--- Loxodon — Unarmored Caster's turn ---
→ Dropping concentration on Hypnotic Pattern
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Loxodon — Unarmored Caster is affected by Greater Invisibility.
ACTION: Cast Healing Word (Level 1 slot) on Loxodon — Unarmored Caster.
→ Loxodon — Unarmored Caster healed for 8 HP. HP: 24/67
--- Ogre's turn ---
Ogre attacks Loxodon — Unarmored Caster with Greatclub: [d20:16+6=22 vs AC 17] HIT! 15 damage. Loxodon — Unarmored Caster HP: 9/67
--- Frost Giant's turn ---
Frost Giant attacks Loxodon — Unarmored Caster with Greataxe: [d20:20+9=29 vs AC 17] CRITICAL HIT! 42 damage. Loxodon — Unarmored Caster HP: 0/67
→ Loxodon — Unarmored Caster loses concentration on Greater Invisibility! [CON save 5 vs DC 21]
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 2 rounds ===
